metadata.title: Study Hours and Marks Prediction Using Linear Regression: A Reproducible Beginner Study
metadata.description: This educational preprint presents a reproducible Linear Regression study that predicts marks from study hours using a synthetic dataset of 20 records. It reports a fixed train-test split, a mean-value baseline, five-fold cross-validation, input validation, and unit tests. The work is intended for learning and must not be used for real student assessment. Version 1.0 has not been peer reviewed. Source code repository: https://github.com/suvodeeproy94-tech/Study-Hours-Marks-Prediction
metadata.notes: Educational preprint. Not peer reviewed. DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20911341. Source code: https://github.com/suvodeeproy94-tech/Study-Hours-Marks-Prediction. The dataset is synthetic, and no real student data was collected. The paper, dataset, figures, and publication metadata use CC BY 4.0. The Python source code uses the MIT License.
